f47.f52: string (PIN block encrypted with PEK, base64 encoded)
f47.aav: string (Application Authentication Value, base64 encoded — HMAC-SHA1)
f47.response_code: string (ISO 8583 response code, e.g. 00=OK, 55=wrong PIN, 82=bad ARQC, N7=bad CVV2)

f55.arpc: string (ARPC base64, 8 bytes — present on 0110 response)
f55.amount_auth: string (Amount Authorised, 6 bytes BCD hex, e.g. '000000001000')
f55.amount_other: string (Amount Other, 6 bytes BCD hex, e.g. '000000000000')
f55.terminal_country: string (Terminal Country Code, 2 bytes hex, e.g. '0208')
f55.currency_code: string (Transaction Currency Code, 2 bytes hex, e.g. '0978')
f55.transaction_date: string (Transaction Date YYMMDD, 3 bytes BCD hex, e.g. '260530')
